hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞；【WORLD】鲍文：霍尔木兹海峡对峙增加了重新陷入全面战争的风险；【CRYPTO】随着 K33 标记空头挤压风险，比特币创下十年来最长的负融资记录。

items.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
items.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.
items.title_zh: Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪 (Dario Amodei) 警告称，人工智能为软件公司、政府和银行修复数以万计的漏洞创造了一个狭窄的窗口。

items.title: Bowen: Strait of Hormuz standoff raises risk of sliding back into all-out war
items.summary: The US and Iran's determination to keep the pressure on each other has put the fragile Gulf ceasefire in serious jeopardy.
items.title_zh: 鲍文：霍尔木兹海峡对峙增加了重新陷入全面战争的风险
items.summary_zh: 美国和伊朗决心继续向对方施加压力，这使脆弱的海湾停火协议面临严重危险。

items.title: Bitcoin hits longest negative funding streak this decade as K33 flags short squeeze risk
items.summary: Buying bitcoin during such negative funding regimes has consistently led to strong forward returns, Head of Research Vetle Lunde said.
items.title_zh: 随着 K33 标记空头挤压风险，比特币创下十年来最长的负融资记录
items.summary_zh: 研究主管 Vetle Lunde 表示，在这种负融资制度下购买比特币一直会带来强劲的远期回报。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant：更智能、更清晰、更个性化
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.5 即时更新 ChatGPT 的默认模型，提供更智能、更准确的答案、减少幻觉并改进个性化控制。

items.title: Bitcoin approaches $82,000 as oil crashes 6% on fresh Iran peace deal hopes
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed toward $82,000 alongside a more than 1% rise in Nasdaq futures amid reports of progress toward a U.S.–Iran memorandum of understanding.
items.title_zh: 伊朗和平协议希望达成，油价暴跌 6%，比特币逼近 82,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 据报道，美国与伊朗签署谅解备忘录取得进展，比特币价格攀升至 82,000 美元，纳斯达克期货价格上涨超过 1%。

items.title: Attackers drain $1.4M in wrapped bitcoin from DeFi protocol Ekubo in approval-based exploit
items.summary: Ekubo Protocol lost roughly $1.4 million in WBTC after attackers exploited a flaw in its EVM swap router contracts.
items.title_zh: 攻击者利用基于批准的漏洞，从 DeFi 协议 Ekubo 中窃取了价值 140 万美元的打包比特币
items.summary_zh: 在攻击者利用其 EVM 交换路由器合约中的缺陷后，Ekubo Protocol 损失了大约 140 万美元的 WBTC。

items.title: Strategy likely to sell bitcoin to cover STRC dividends, Michael Saylor says
items.summary: Saylor explained that this will eventually help Strategy buy more bitcoin than it sells to cover dividends for its STRC.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·塞勒表示，可能会出售比特币来支付 STRC 股息的策略
items.summary_zh: Saylor 解释说，这最终将帮助 Strategy 购买比出售的更多的比特币，以支付其 STRC 的股息。

items.title: Strategy posts $12.5 billion Q1 loss as execs tout STRC ‘big success’
items.summary: The premier bitcoin treasury company said strong demand for STRC helped it raise $5.58 billion out of a total $11.68 billion so far this year.
items.title_zh: Strategy 公布第一季度亏损 125 亿美元，高管称 STRC“取得巨大成功”
items.summary_zh: 这家首屈一指的比特币资金公司表示，对 STRC 的强劲需求帮助其筹集了 55.8 亿美元，而今年迄今为止，该公司筹集的资金总额为 116.8 亿美元。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports
items.summary: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推进特朗普支持的终止强制性季度收益报告的提案
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 正式提议修改规则，允许公司以新表格 10-S 提交半年报，以取代传统的季度 10-Q 表格

items.title: UniCredit CEO says taking control of Commerzbank ‘not the expected scenario’
items.summary: The Italian lender is making a takeover bid for German rival Commerzbank, despite pushback in Germany.
items.title_zh: 联合信贷银行首席执行官表示，控制德国商业银行“不是预期的情况”
items.summary_zh: 尽管遭到德国的反对，这家意大利银行仍在向德国竞争对手德国商业银行提出收购要约。

items.title: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz won’t return to normal until August or later, according to Kalshi traders
items.summary: With a lack of a breakthrough in negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, traders increasingly see traffic returning to normal later and later.
items.title_zh: 卡尔什贸易商表示，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到八月或更晚才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 由于美国和伊朗之间的谈判缺乏突破，交易员越来越认为交通恢复正常的时间越来越晚。

items.title: BBC traces how 10 minutes of Israeli bombing brought devastation to Lebanon
items.summary: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.
items.title_zh: BBC 追踪以色列 10 分钟的轰炸如何给黎巴嫩带来破坏
items.summary_zh: 炸弹于下午 14 点 15 分开始落下，给全国带来混乱和破坏。

items.title: China calls for Strait to be reopened 'as soon as possible' in Iran talks
items.summary: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.
items.title_zh: 中国呼吁在伊朗谈判中“尽快”重新开放海峡
items.summary_zh: 王毅正在与伊朗外长阿拉格奇举行会谈。阿拉格奇是战后首次访华。

items.title: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
items.summary: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.
items.title_zh: 在基辅和莫斯科提出停火协议之前，俄罗斯的袭击造成20多人死亡
items.summary_zh: 基辅表示将于5月6日开始休战，然后在莫斯科宣布暂停胜利日阅兵后“采取对称行动”。

items.title: Trump Again Shifts U.S. Focus on Strait, Pausing Day-Old Escort Mission
items.summary: The president made the announcement in a social media post just hours after Secretary of State Marco Rubio had affirmed the newly created mission, which bore little connection to the original justification for war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普再次将美国重点转向海峡，暂停了一天前的护航任务
items.summary_zh: 就在国务卿马可·鲁比奥确认新成立的代表团几个小时后，总统在社交媒体上宣布了这一消息，该代表团与最初的战争理由几乎没有关系。

items.title: Trump Looks for a Silver Bullet to End the Iran War. There May Be None.
items.summary: The president is trying to ratchet up the economic pressure on Tehran, but Iran’s government is unlikely to make a deal without a big, face-saving compromise.
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求结束伊朗战争的灵丹妙药。可能没有。
items.summary_zh: 总统正试图加大对德黑兰的经济压力，但如果不做出重大的、保全面子的妥协，伊朗政府不太可能达成协议。

items.title: From 'what' to 'how': Robinhood and Bitstamp say banks are ready to build on-chain
items.summary: Executives from Ondo, Robinhood and Babylon Labs said at Consensus Miami 2026 that banks and traditional finance firms are embracing crypto infrastructure, though institutional adoption remains constrained.
items.title_zh: 从“什么”到“如何”：Robinhood 和 Bitstamp 表示银行已准备好建立链上业务
items.summary_zh: Ondo、Robinhood 和 Babylon Labs 的高管在 2026 年迈阿密共识大会上表示，银行和传统金融公司正在拥抱加密基础设施，尽管机构采用仍然受到限制。

items.title: Multicoin goes big on zcash as privacy trade returns
items.summary: The purchase marks a shift from Multicoin’s 2019 view, as ZEC has surged over 1,500% in the last year.
items.title_zh: 随着隐私交易的回归，Multicoin 在 zcash 上大放异彩
items.summary_zh: 这次购买标志着 Multicoin 2019 年观点的转变，因为 ZEC 在去年飙升了 1,500% 以上。

items.title: Crypto custodian Taurus moves straight into EU capital markets with MiFID license in Cyprus
items.summary: The license allows the firm to offer tokenized financial instruments to EU banks as well as secondary trading for tokenized bonds, fund shares, equities, and structured products.
items.title_zh: 加密货币托管机构 Taurus 凭借塞浦路斯 MiFID 许可证直接进入欧盟资本市场
items.summary_zh: 该许可证允许该公司向欧盟银行提供代币化金融工具以及代币化债券、基金份额、股票和结构性产品的二级交易。

items.title: CFTC looks to cement non-custodial software developer protections following Phantom no-action letter
items.summary: The CFTC is considering writing rules to further cement its stance on whether software developers should register as brokers with the agency.
items.title_zh: CFTC 希望在 Phantom 无行动信函之后加强对非托管软件开发商的保护
items.summary_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会正在考虑制定规则，以进一步巩固其关于软件开发商是否应在该机构注册为经纪人的立场。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #912.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Firo (FIRO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#912。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 15。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #20.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 20。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #216.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Billions Network (BILL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 216 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #87.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 87。

items.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
items.summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
items.title_zh: 购买 ChatGPT 广告的新方式
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过测试版自助广告管理器、每次点击费用出价和增强的测量工具扩展了 ChatGPT 广告，旨在保护隐私并将对话与广告分开。

items.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
items.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道合作重新构想 CFO 办公室
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道正在合作，帮助企业使用人工智能代理实现财务工作流程自动化、改进预测、加强控制以及实现 CFO 职能现代化。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bitcoin moves above $82,000 while ZEC and DASH post double-digit rallies
items.summary: BTC climbed above $82,00 as a weaker dollar lifted crypto markets, while privacy coins and AI-linked tokens led an altcoin rally.
items.title_zh: 比特币升至 82,000 美元上方，ZEC 和 DASH 出现两位数上涨
items.summary_zh: 由于美元走软提振了加密货币市场，比特币攀升至 82 美元以上，而隐私币和人工智能相关代币则引领了山寨币的上涨。

items.title: Bitcoin's price rally has a hidden rhythm. Here are the hours and days driving gains.
items.summary: Bitcoin’s three-month rally shows a clear internal structure than most traders might expect, with performance clustering around specific trading windows across global sessions.
items.title_zh: 比特币的价格上涨有一个隐藏的节奏。以下是推动收益增长的时间和天数。
items.summary_zh: 比特币三个月的上涨显示出比大多数交易者预期的清晰的内部结构，其表现集中在全球交易时段的特定交易窗口周围。

items.title: Ethereum co-founder Lubin backs ETH treasury firms, calls DATs ‘profound innovation’
items.summary: Joseph Lubin backed ETH treasury firms, confirmed Linea's Linux Foundation move, and highlighted Ethereum's quantum-safe roadmap.
items.title_zh: 以太坊联合创始人 Lubin 支持 ETH 财务公司，称 DAT 为“深刻的创新”
items.summary_zh: Joseph Lubin 支持 ETH 财务公司，确认了 Linea 的 Linux 基金会举措，并强调了以太坊的量子安全路线图。

items.title: Colombian president seeks to transform the Caribbean into bitcoin mining hub
items.summary: Petro pointed to Venezuela and Paraguay as countries that managed to attract investment in bitcoin mining with abundant clean energy.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚总统寻求将加勒比地区转变为比特币挖矿中心
items.summary_zh: 佩特罗指出，委内瑞拉和巴拉圭是凭借丰富的清洁能源成功吸引比特币挖矿投资的国家。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones
items.summary: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.
items.title_zh: 英特尔和美光准备打破重大里程碑

items.title: After Coinbase, prediction market traders forecast more tech layoffs ahead

items.title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
items.summary: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.

items.title: Traders are doubtful Cohen's GameStop can pull off monster eBay acquisition
items.summary: Traders on Kalshi and Polymarket give the company just a 25% and 15% chance, respectively, of successfully buying the online marketplace.

items.title: Kalshi traders see April jobs report coming in better than economists' estimates

items.title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
items.summary: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.

items.summary_zh: 乌克兰奥列什基市的人们表示，他们的新鲜食品或药品供应已经中断了几个月。

items.title: IS families in Syria have booked tickets home to Australia, minister says

items.title: In Venezuela, Trump Vowed to Show Accountability. But Secret Oil Deals Linger.
items.summary: Trump officials and their Venezuelan allies have promised a new era of accountability to unlock Venezuela’s immense oil wealth. But the country’s oil industry remains a black hole.
items.title_zh: 在委内瑞拉，特朗普誓言要承担责任。但秘密石油交易依然存在。

items.title: Rare Comet Appears Over New Zealand, Australia and South Africa
items.summary: Known as C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS, the comet will be visible to stargazers using a telescope in New Zealand, Australia and South Africa.

items.summary_zh: 这颗被称为 C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS 的彗星将被新西兰、澳大利亚和南非的观星者使用望远镜观测到。

items.title: What a Bike Ride in Cape Town Taught Me About Apartheid

items.title: Taiwan Could Learn From Ukraine. Informally, Connections Are Growing.
